default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and site optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content length scaled down to 1,000-1,300 words per article; focus on value and answering reader queries](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [22 new/revised articles ready for review, to be staggered for publication over coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Site performance slightly down, likely due to lack of new content and recent Google core update](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [Action plan developed to improve site indexing and remove low-value pages](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Strategy

  - [Scaled down article length to 1,000-1,300 words](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [10 initial articles + 2 calibration pieces revised and ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [New batch of topics completed, catching up on content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Two new topic clusters added: "Master Informative Assessment for Student Success" and "Student Outcomes Impacted by Formative Assessment"](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Considering verticalization of content (e.g., elementary, middle school)](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [Expect to see significant traffic increases by 2nd-3rd month of consistent publishing](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

### Site Mapping and Indexing

  - [Identified issues with current site indexing; many low-value pages indexed](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Action items:](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
    1.  Review pages crawled but not indexed in Google Search Console
    2.  Identify indexed pages that should be blocked (e.g., thin content)
    3.  Create list of pages to block and work with web team to implement
  - [Dave to assist with quick analysis using word count as a qualifier for low-value pages](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Site Performance

  - [Overall site performance down week-over-week (impressions and clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [March performance: 5k increase in clicks, higher average position and CTR compared to previous 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Recent Google core update may cause fluctuations for a few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Consistent publishing crucial for maintaining and improving performance](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)

### Content Publication Strategy

  - [22 articles ready for publication by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Plan to stagger publication rather than publishing all at once](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a recommended publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Google Doc links for revised content and update Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [SchoolAI team to review each article before publication](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1568.0)
  - [Dave to analyze indexed pages and provide recommendations for removal/blocking](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Implement staggered publishing schedule for new content](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Continue monitoring site performance as new content is published](https://fathom.video/share/xWNHosmM2vdeHCRPEo_y2sox5DyFFPf7?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

action_items.description: Review final batch of 10 revised articles + 2 calibration articles; send to SchoolAI team via chat
Review second batch of new articles; send to SchoolAI team tomorrow
Send list of suggested topics for next week's content to SchoolAI team today/tomorrow
Analyze SchoolAI's indexed pages; flag low word count pages for potential removal from index
Create staggered publishing schedule for 22 new articles; share with Cameron
Review new batches of content when received; provide feedback if needed
